english: Then Rama, exhausted from battle and standing anxious on the battlefield
Seeing Ravana standing before him ready for battle
The sage Agastya, who had come with the gods to witness the battle
Approached Rama and the blessed sage Agastya spoke

hindi: राम राम महाबाहो शृणु गुह्यं सनातनम्।
english: O Rama, O mighty-armed one, hear this eternal secret
roman: Ram Ram mahabaho shrinu guhyam sanatanum

english: By which you will conquer all enemies in battle, O dear one
roman: Yena sarvan areen vatsa samare vijayishyasi

english: This Aditya Hridaya is sacred, destroyer of all enemies
roman: Aditya Hridayam punyam sarva shatru vinashanam

english: Chanting it always brings victory — it is imperishable and supremely auspicious
It is the most auspicious of all auspicious things, destroyer of all sins
roman: Sarva mangala mangalyam sarva papa pranashanam

english: It removes anxiety and grief and is the best enhancer of life

hindi: एष ब्रह्मा च विष्णुश्च शिवः स्कन्दः प्रजापतिः।
english: He is Brahma, Vishnu, Shiva, Skanda and Prajapati
roman: Esha Brahma cha Vishnushcha Shivah Skandah Prajapatih

hindi: महेन्द्रो धनदः कालो यमः सोमो ह्यपां पतिः॥
english: He is Mahendra, Kubera, Kala, Yama, Soma and the lord of waters
roman: Mahendro dhanadah kalo Yamah Somo hyapam patih
